nasb.text: yet because this widow bothers me, I will give her legal protection, otherwise by continually coming she will wear me out.’ ”

esv.text: yet because this widow keeps bothering me, I will give her justice, so that she will not beat me down by her continual coming.’”

cnv.text: 只是因為這寡婦常常來麻煩我，就給她伸冤吧，免得她不斷地來纏擾我。’”

ccb.text: 可是这寡妇一直来烦我，还是替她申冤好了，免得她再来烦我！’”

csbs.text: 还是因为这寡妇不断地烦扰我，我就为她讨个公道，免得她一直来，到最后使我疲惫不堪！’”
